book_row_default_rebuild_reason: Book data is outdated and must be rebuilt.
book_row_no_metadata: No metadata yet — run the pipeline to extract book details
index_books_empty_subtitle: Upload a PDF to get started
settings_apiKey_description: Configure API keys for AI pipeline features.
books_deleteDialog_body_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete
books_deleteDialog_body_suffix: ? This will remove all extracted data and cannot be undone.
pipeline_stage_extract_description: Extract text and images from each page of the PDF using AI-powered analysis.
pipeline_stage_storyboard_description: Arrange extracted content into a structured storyboard with pages, sections, and layouts.
pipeline_stage_quizzes_description: Generate comprehension quizzes and activities based on the book content.
pipeline_stage_captions_description: Create descriptive captions for images to improve accessibility.
pipeline_stage_glossary_description: Build a glossary of key terms and definitions found in the text.
pipeline_stage_text_and_speech_descripti: Translate the book content and generate audio narration.
pipeline_stage_preview_description: Package and preview the final ADT web application.
extract_no_pages: No pages extracted yet. Run the pipeline to extract content.
extract_detail_no_text: No extracted text yet. Run the pipeline first.
extract_settings_page_range_hint: Leave empty to process all pages.
extract_settings_spread_hint: Enable for scanned books where two pages appear on a single PDF page.
extract_settings_editing_language_hint: Leave empty to use the book language.
extract_settings_image_filters_hint: Images with shortest side below min or longest side above max are pruned.
extract_settings_complexity_hint: Higher values filter out simple or blank images.
extract_settings_meaningfulness_hint: Use an LLM to filter out decorative or non-educational images.
extract_settings_cropping_hint: Use an LLM to crop away stray text, artifacts, and excessive whitespace from image edges.
extract_settings_segmentation_hint: Use an LLM to detect and split composited images (e.g., multiple photos in a single image layer) into individual segments. Requires GPT-5.2+.
extract_settings_text_types_description: Types used during text classification. Pruned types are excluded from rendering.
extract_settings_metadata_prompt_desc: The prompt template used to extract book metadata (title, author, etc.) from the first few pages. This is a Liquid template processed with page context.
extract_settings_classification_prompt_d: The prompt template used for text classification. This is a Liquid template processed with page context.
extract_settings_meaningfulness_prompt_d: LLM-based filter to determine if extracted images are meaningful.
extract_settings_cropping_prompt_desc: LLM-based cropping to remove stray text, artifacts, and excessive whitespace from extracted images.
extract_settings_seg_min_side_hint: Skip segmentation for images whose shortest side is below this threshold.
extract_settings_segmentation_prompt_des: LLM-based segmentation to detect and split composited images into individual segments. Requires GPT-5.2+ for accurate bounding box coordinates.
extract_settings_summary_prompt_desc: The prompt template used to generate a short book summary at the end of extract. The summary is generated in the configured editing language.
extract_settings_save_rerun_desc: This will save your settings and re-run the extraction pipeline. Any manual edits to extracted text will be overwritten for affected pages.
sidebar_export_timeout: Export timed out — the book may be too large
settings_not_available: Settings for this step are not yet available.
